title: Cache corruption following IO error on systems supporting atomic-write
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_cache (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE test_cache SET data = 'Updated data' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_cache WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Cache corruption after IO error with atomic-write support
